ticketTemplate.title: WING⚡BOSS STAFF TICKET
prep_notes_default: D5/D6 premium hot sauce drizzle should be applied lightly.
Do not give extra sauce, rub, drizzle, dip, cheese, bottle, or heat upgrade unless selected and charged.
For Lemon Pepper: seasoning only, no lemon slice.
Confirm advanced flavor availability before cooking.

example_advanced_ticket.formula: Firestorm x Armageddon x Mango Habanero

lessons.title: Rule 1
lessons.english: Wings come with sauce OR dry rub as included flavor choice.
lessons.staffAction: Apply this rule before confirming or preparing the order.
lessons.commonMistake: Ignoring this rule during busy service.
lessons.checkQuestion: What should you check before cooking?
lessons.answer: Check the item, flavor, add-ons, serving units, and any paid upgrades.

lessons.title: Rule 2
lessons.english: Dry Rub and Drizzle upgrades are charged PER SERVING, not per whole order.
lessons.staffAction: Apply this rule before confirming or preparing the order.
lessons.commonMistake: Ignoring this rule during busy service.
lessons.checkQuestion: What should you check before cooking?
lessons.answer: Check the item, flavor, add-ons, serving units, and any paid upgrades.

lessons.answer: Check the item, flavor, add-ons, serving units, and any paid upgrades.

lessons.title: How to Read Heat Score and Heat Rewards
lessons.english: Heat Points are earned only after an order is paid, completed, and not refunded. Heat rewards are manual claim buttons before payment, and rewards apply to food only.
lessons.staffAction: Check the staff ticket for heat modifiers, reward redemption, and whether the reward applies only to food.
lessons.commonMistake: Do not apply heat rewards to delivery fees, alcohol, or hot sauce bottles.
lessons.checkQuestion: When do Heat Points count?
lessons.answer: Only after the order is paid, completed, and not refunded.

lessons.title: Sauce, Dry Rub, Drizzle Order
lessons.english: Sauce first. Dry rub second. Drizzle last. D5/D6 premium hot sauce drizzle should be applied lightly.
lessons.exampleOrder: 12 Wings + Buffalo + D6 Strawberry Armageddon drizzle
lessons.staffAction: Prepare in the correct order and confirm D5/D6 premium drizzle was paid for.
lessons.commonMistake: Adding premium drizzle without charge or applying too much.
lessons.checkQuestion: What order do sauce, dry rub, and drizzle go in?
lessons.answer: Sauce first, dry rub second, drizzle last.
